---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, notifier, adapter, or scenario
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## The problem

<!-- What alerting scenario or workflow is hard/impossible today? Be concrete. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the config / API / output look like? -->

```yaml
# sketch of the config you'd like to write
features:
  my_new_feature:
    enabled: true
```

## Which part of the library would change?

- [ ] New **feature** under `src/cloud_alert_hub/features/`
- [ ] New **cloud adapter** under `src/cloud_alert_hub/adapters/`
- [ ] New **notifier** under `src/cloud_alert_hub/notifiers/`
- [ ] New **config option** (no new file)
- [ ] Docs / example only
- [ ] Other: ...

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, other designs you rejected, existing features that almost work. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to cloud docs, payload shapes, screenshots — anything useful. -->
